title: Project name identity is stable across aliases, abbreviations, and misspellings

summary.canonical_identity: Mirror Cartographer is the stable project identity. Variants in spacing, capitalization, abbreviation, nickname, transcription, or misspelling do not by themselves establish a renamed project.
summary.alias_rule: Treat forms such as MirrorCartographer, Mirror Cartographer, MC, and contextually attributable misspellings or shorthand as aliases of one project unless an explicit versioned decision states that a rename occurred.
summary.disambiguation_rule: Do not merge an ambiguous token into the project identity solely because it resembles an alias. Require contextual linkage through nearby project concepts, repository identity, explicit reference, or a recorded decision.
summary.history_rule: Store aliases as attributed labels connected to the canonical project node. Preserve when and where each alias appeared without rewriting the canonical identity or inventing separate projects.
summary.knowledge_graph_implication: Represent one canonical project node with alias_of edges from observed variants; reserve renamed_to or supersedes edges for explicit, provenance-backed naming decisions.

claim_classification.observed: The project identity remained stable while multiple written forms, abbreviations, nicknames, and misspellings were used.
claim_classification.inferred: Treating every variant as a rename fragments continuity and creates false project histories.
claim_classification.proposed: Maintain one canonical project identity and attach variants as provenance-bearing aliases.
claim_classification.superseded: Inferring that the project changed names whenever its wording, spacing, capitalization, shorthand, or spelling changed.
claim_classification.unresolved: The exhaustive alias inventory, first-observed dates, and context-specific ambiguous forms remain to be reconstructed.

falsification_or_review_route: Search decision logs, repository history, and private-chat references for an explicit rename decision. If found, add a versioned correction linking the old and new identities; do not overwrite this record.
